content.speakerText: I noticed you’re carrying a guitar case—do you play?
content.speakerTextCn: 我注意到你带着吉他包——你会弹吗？
expectedAnswers: Yeah, I’ve been playing for five years. Just practicing for an open mic next week!
Not really—I’m just carrying it for a friend. But I’d love to learn!
Actually, I play jazz on weekends. Do you like music?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否基于观察自然开启对话并回应对方提问
语言准确性：是否正确使用了进行时、完成时等时态
表达自然度：是否使用了真实口语表达（open mic, not really, actually）
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 guitar / play / carry / practice 等场景关键词

content.scenarioHint: 你在一家温馨的咖啡馆等朋友，注意到墙上挂着一幅手绘插画，画中有只猫在喝咖啡。你想用这个细节开启一段轻松对话。
content.speakerText: That cat on the wall is so cute—did the artist make it just for this café?
content.speakerTextCn: 墙上的那只猫太可爱了——这位艺术家是专门为这家咖啡馆画的吗？
expectedAnswers: Yeah, I heard the owner commissions local artists—this one’s her favorite!
I think so! I’ve seen similar art in her other café downtown.
Wow, I’d love to meet the artist—do you know if she’s around today?
That’s so cool—I’ve never seen a cat with a latte before!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否通过观察环境细节自然开启话题
语言准确性：语法和用词是否正确，是否使用了恰当的表达如 'commission', 'local artists'
表达自然度：是否符合英语母语者日常对话的语气和节奏
关键词覆盖：是否使用了场景关键词如 'cat', 'wall', 'artist', 'café'

content.scenarioHint: 你坐在咖啡馆窗边，看到外面下着小雨，而邻座的陌生人正撑着一把色彩鲜艳的印花伞。你想借此打破沉默，开启一段友好对话。
content.speakerText: That umbrella is amazing—did you pick it out yourself?
content.speakerTextCn: 这把伞太棒了——是你自己挑的吗？
expectedAnswers: I did! It’s from a little shop in Kyoto—I bring it everywhere when it rains.
Yes! I bought it on vacation last year—it’s my mood booster.
Haha, actually my sister gave it to me. She says it makes me look cheerful.
I couldn’t resist—it’s the only thing that makes rainy days fun!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否通过观察外部环境细节自然开启对话
语言准确性：语法和用词是否正确，是否使用了恰当的表达如 'pick out', 'mood booster'
表达自然度：是否符合英语母语者在公共场合轻松闲聊的语气
关键词覆盖：是否使用了场景关键词如 'umbrella', 'rain', 'picked out', 'shop'
